---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# Epi7 与 Epi13 异质性综合分析
# 比较 BHI vs PEA 组中的细胞异质性
# =============================================================================

# 清理内存
gc()

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggridges)
library(gridExtra)
library(igraph)
library(SCENIC)
library(AUCell)
library(RcisTarget)
library(scater)
library(scran)

# 设置工作目录
setwd("F:/projectmanfei/final")

# 创建输出目录
heterogeneity_dir <- "heterogeneity_analysis"
if (!dir.exists(heterogeneity_dir)) {
  dir.create(heterogeneity_dir)
}

# 创建子目录
subcluster_dir <- file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "01_subclustering")
heterogeneity_score_dir <- file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "02_heterogeneity_scores")
tf_activity_dir <- file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "03_tf_activity")
cell_cycle_dir <- file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "04_cell_cycle")
entropy_dir <- file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "05_entropy_analysis")
pseudotime_dir <- file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "06_pseudotime_density")

dir.create(subcluster_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(heterogeneity_score_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(tf_activity_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(cell_cycle_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(entropy_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(pseudotime_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

cat("=====================================\n")
cat("===== Epi7/Epi13 Heterogeneity Analysis =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤0：加载数据
# =============================================================================
cat("===== Step 0: Loading Data =====\n")

# 加载之前保存的数据
seurat_pure <- readRDS("stage0_preprocessing_results/seurat_pure_annotated.rds")
trajectory_data <- read.csv("enhanced_trajectory_analysis/comprehensive_trajectory_data.csv")
feature_genes <- read.csv("machine_learning_comprehensive_analysis/sensitivity_analysis/feature_genes_detailed_report.csv")

# 提取高一致性特征基因
consensus_genes <- feature_genes %>%
  filter(Selection_Count >= 3) %>%
  pull(Gene)

cat(sprintf("Loaded data:\n"))
cat(sprintf("  - Seurat object: %d cells\n", ncol(seurat_pure)))
cat(sprintf("  - Trajectory data: %d cells\n", nrow(trajectory_data)))
cat(sprintf("  - Consensus genes: %d genes\n", length(consensus_genes)))

# 提取Epi7和Epi13细胞
seurat_epi <- subset(seurat_pure, refined_celltype %in% c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"))
cat(sprintf("\nExtracted Epi7/Epi13: %d cells\n", ncol(seurat_epi)))

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：亚群识别与重新聚类
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 1: Subcluster Identification =====\n")

perform_subclustering <- function(seurat_obj, celltype_name, resolution = 0.3) {
  cat(sprintf("\nSubclustering %s...\n", celltype_name))
  
  # 子集化
  seurat_sub <- subset(seurat_obj, refined_celltype == celltype_name)
  
  # 标准化和聚类
  seurat_sub <- NormalizeData(seurat_sub, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_sub <- FindVariableFeatures(seurat_sub, nfeatures = 2000, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_sub <- ScaleData(seurat_sub, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_sub <- RunPCA(seurat_sub, npcs = 30, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_sub <- FindNeighbors(seurat_sub, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_sub <- FindClusters(seurat_sub, resolution = resolution, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_sub <- RunUMAP(seurat_sub, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
  
  # 添加亚群信息
  seurat_sub$subcluster <- paste0(celltype_name, "_sub", seurat_sub$seurat_clusters)
  
  cat(sprintf("  Found %d subclusters\n", length(unique(seurat_sub$subcluster))))
  
  return(seurat_sub)
}

# 对Epi7和Epi13分别进行亚群分析
seurat_epi7 <- perform_subclustering(seurat_epi, "Epithelial_7", resolution = 0.3)
seurat_epi13 <- perform_subclustering(seurat_epi, "Epithelial_13", resolution = 0.3)

# 可视化亚群
# Epi7 subclusters
p1 <- DimPlot(seurat_epi7, group.by = "subcluster", split.by = "group", 
              label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("Epithelial_7 Subclusters") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "01_Epi7_subclusters_umap.pdf"), 
       p1, width = 12, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "01_Epi7_subclusters_umap.png"), 
       p1, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Epi13 subclusters
p2 <- DimPlot(seurat_epi13, group.by = "subcluster", split.by = "group", 
              label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("Epithelial_13 Subclusters") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "02_Epi13_subclusters_umap.pdf"), 
       p2, width = 12, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "02_Epi13_subclusters_umap.png"), 
       p2, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 统计亚群分布
epi7_subcluster_stats <- seurat_epi7@meta.data %>%
  group_by(group, subcluster) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100)

epi13_subcluster_stats <- seurat_epi13@meta.data %>%
  group_by(group, subcluster) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100)

write.csv(epi7_subcluster_stats, 
          file.path(subcluster_dir, "Epi7_subcluster_distribution.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(epi13_subcluster_stats, 
          file.path(subcluster_dir, "Epi13_subcluster_distribution.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 亚群分布柱状图
p3 <- ggplot(epi7_subcluster_stats, aes(x = subcluster, y = percentage, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Epithelial_7 Subcluster Distribution",
       x = "Subcluster", y = "Percentage (%)", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "03_Epi7_subcluster_barplot.pdf"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "03_Epi7_subcluster_barplot.png"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

p4 <- ggplot(epi13_subcluster_stats, aes(x = subcluster, y = percentage, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Epithelial_13 Subcluster Distribution",
       x = "Subcluster", y = "Percentage (%)", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "04_Epi13_subcluster_barplot.pdf"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(subcluster_dir, "04_Epi13_subcluster_barplot.png"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：单细胞异质性量化
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 2: Quantifying Single-cell Heterogeneity =====\n")

calculate_heterogeneity_metrics <- function(seurat_obj, celltype_name, group_name) {
  # 提取特定细胞类型和组别
  cells <- seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
    filter(refined_celltype == celltype_name, group == group_name) %>%
    rownames()
  
  if (length(cells) < 10) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # 提取表达数据
  expr_data <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, slot = "data")[, cells])
  
  # 1. 变异系数 (Coefficient of Variation)
  gene_means <- rowMeans(expr_data)
  gene_sds <- apply(expr_data, 1, sd)
  cv <- gene_sds / (gene_means + 1e-10)
  mean_cv <- mean(cv[is.finite(cv)])
  
  # 2. 基因表达熵
  calculate_entropy <- function(x) {
    x <- x[x > 0]
    if (length(x) < 2) return(0)
    p <- x / sum(x)
    -sum(p * log2(p))
  }
  
  gene_entropies <- apply(expr_data, 1, calculate_entropy)
  mean_entropy <- mean(gene_entropies[is.finite(gene_entropies)])
  
  # 3. 细胞间欧氏距离
  if (ncol(expr_data) > 1) {
    cell_distances <- dist(t(expr_data))
    mean_distance <- mean(cell_distances)
    sd_distance <- sd(cell_distances)
  } else {
    mean_distance <- NA
    sd_distance <- NA
  }
  
  # 4. 使用高变基因计算
  variable_genes <- VariableFeatures(seurat_obj)
  if (length(variable_genes) > 0) {
    var_expr <- expr_data[intersect(rownames(expr_data), variable_genes), ]
    if (nrow(var_expr) > 0) {
      var_cv <- apply(var_expr, 1, function(x) sd(x) / (mean(x) + 1e-10))
      mean_var_cv <- mean(var_cv[is.finite(var_cv)])
    } else {
      mean_var_cv <- NA
    }
  } else {
    mean_var_cv <- NA
  }
  
  return(data.frame(
    CellType = celltype_name,
    Group = group_name,
    N_Cells = length(cells),
    Mean_CV = mean_cv,
    Mean_Entropy = mean_entropy,
    Mean_Cell_Distance = mean_distance,
    SD_Cell_Distance = sd_distance,
    Mean_Variable_CV = mean_var_cv,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

# 计算所有组合的异质性指标
heterogeneity_metrics <- list()

for (celltype in c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13")) {
  for (group in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
    cat(sprintf("Calculating heterogeneity for %s in %s...\n", celltype, group))
    
    metrics <- calculate_heterogeneity_metrics(seurat_epi, celltype, group)
    
    if (!is.null(metrics)) {
      heterogeneity_metrics[[paste(celltype, group, sep = "_")]] <- metrics
    }
  }
}

# 合并结果
heterogeneity_df <- do.call(rbind, heterogeneity_metrics)
rownames(heterogeneity_df) <- NULL

write.csv(heterogeneity_df, 
          file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "heterogeneity_metrics_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 可视化异质性指标
metrics_long <- heterogeneity_df %>%
  select(CellType, Group, Mean_CV, Mean_Entropy, Mean_Variable_CV) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Mean_CV, Mean_Entropy, Mean_Variable_CV), 
               names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")

p5 <- ggplot(metrics_long, aes(x = CellType, y = Value, fill = Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Heterogeneity Metrics Comparison",
       x = "Cell Type", y = "Metric Value") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "01_heterogeneity_metrics_barplot.pdf"), 
       p5, width = 10, height = 10)
ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "01_heterogeneity_metrics_barplot.png"), 
       p5, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：基于机器学习特征基因的异质性评分
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 3: ML Feature-based Heterogeneity Score =====\n")

calculate_ml_heterogeneity <- function(seurat_obj, consensus_genes) {
  # 提取表达数据
  available_genes <- intersect(consensus_genes, rownames(seurat_obj))
  
  if (length(available_genes) < 10) {
    cat("Warning: Too few consensus genes available\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  expr_matrix <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, slot = "data")[available_genes, ])
  
  # 方法1: 与群体均值的欧氏距离
  group_mean <- rowMeans(expr_matrix)
  euclidean_dist <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, function(x) {
    sqrt(sum((x - group_mean)^2))
  })
  
  # 方法2: KNN距离
  if (ncol(expr_matrix) > 10) {
    knn_dist <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, function(cell) {
      distances <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, function(other_cell) {
        sqrt(sum((cell - other_cell)^2))
      })
      mean(sort(distances)[2:6])  # 取最近5个邻居的平均距离
    })
  } else {
    knn_dist <- rep(NA, ncol(expr_matrix))
  }
  
  # 方法3: 局部密度估计
  if (ncol(expr_matrix) > 10) {
    local_density <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, function(cell) {
      distances <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, function(other_cell) {
        sqrt(sum((cell - other_cell)^2))
      })
      # 使用高斯核
      sum(exp(-distances^2 / (2 * median(distances)^2)))
    })
  } else {
    local_density <- rep(NA, ncol(expr_matrix))
  }
  
  # 创建数据框
  heterogeneity_scores <- data.frame(
    cell_id = colnames(expr_matrix),
    euclidean_distance = euclidean_dist,
    knn_distance = knn_dist,
    local_density = local_density,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  return(heterogeneity_scores)
}

# 计算异质性评分
cat("Calculating ML-based heterogeneity scores...\n")
ml_scores <- calculate_ml_heterogeneity(seurat_epi, consensus_genes)

if (!is.null(ml_scores)) {
  # 添加元数据
  ml_scores <- ml_scores %>%
    left_join(seurat_epi@meta.data %>% 
               select(refined_celltype, group) %>%
               rownames_to_column("cell_id"), 
             by = "cell_id")
  
  # 保存结果
  write.csv(ml_scores, 
            file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "ml_based_heterogeneity_scores.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 可视化
  p6 <- ggplot(ml_scores, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = euclidean_distance, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "ML Feature-based Heterogeneity (Euclidean Distance)",
         x = "Cell Type", y = "Distance from Population Mean") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "02_ml_heterogeneity_euclidean.pdf"), 
         p6, width = 10, height = 6)
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "02_ml_heterogeneity_euclidean.png"), 
         p6, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
  p7 <- ggplot(ml_scores, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = knn_distance, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "ML Feature-based Heterogeneity (KNN Distance)",
         x = "Cell Type", y = "Mean KNN Distance") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "03_ml_heterogeneity_knn.pdf"), 
         p7, width = 10, height = 6)
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "03_ml_heterogeneity_knn.png"), 
         p7, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  
  # 统计检验
  stat_results <- ml_scores %>%
    group_by(refined_celltype) %>%
    summarise(
      wilcox_p_euclidean = wilcox.test(
        euclidean_distance[group == "PEA"],
        euclidean_distance[group == "BHI"]
      )$p.value,
      wilcox_p_knn = wilcox.test(
        knn_distance[group == "PEA"],
        knn_distance[group == "BHI"]
      )$p.value,
      mean_euclidean_BHI = mean(euclidean_distance[group == "BHI"], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_euclidean_PEA = mean(euclidean_distance[group == "PEA"], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_knn_BHI = mean(knn_distance[group == "BHI"], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_knn_PEA = mean(knn_distance[group == "PEA"], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  write.csv(stat_results, 
            file.path(heterogeneity_score_dir, "heterogeneity_statistical_tests.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
}

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：细胞周期异质性分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 4: Cell Cycle Heterogeneity =====\n")

# 加载细胞周期基因
s.genes <- cc.genes$s.genes
g2m.genes <- cc.genes$g2m.genes

# 计算细胞周期评分
seurat_epi <- CellCycleScoring(seurat_epi, 
                               s.features = s.genes, 
                               g2m.features = g2m.genes,
                               set.ident = FALSE)

# 统计细胞周期分布
cell_cycle_stats <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group, Phase) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100)

write.csv(cell_cycle_stats, 
          file.path(cell_cycle_dir, "cell_cycle_distribution.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 可视化细胞周期分布
p8 <- ggplot(cell_cycle_stats, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = percentage, fill = Phase)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~group) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("G1" = "#F8766D", "G2M" = "#00BA38", "S" = "#619CFF")) +
  labs(title = "Cell Cycle Phase Distribution",
       x = "Cell Type", y = "Percentage (%)", fill = "Phase") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(cell_cycle_dir, "01_cell_cycle_distribution.pdf"), 
       p8, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(cell_cycle_dir, "01_cell_cycle_distribution.png"), 
       p8, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 细胞周期评分对比
p9 <- ggplot(seurat_epi@meta.data, aes(x = S.Score, y = G2M.Score, color = Phase)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_grid(refined_celltype ~ group) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("G1" = "#F8766D", "G2M" = "#00BA38", "S" = "#619CFF")) +
  labs(title = "Cell Cycle Score Distribution",
       x = "S Score", y = "G2M Score") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(cell_cycle_dir, "02_cell_cycle_scores.pdf"), 
       p9, width = 12, height = 8)
ggsave(file.path(cell_cycle_dir, "02_cell_cycle_scores.png"), 
       p9, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：单细胞熵和复杂度分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 5: Single-cell Entropy Analysis =====\n")

calculate_cell_entropy <- function(expr_vector) {
  # 计算单个细胞的表达熵
  expr_vector <- expr_vector[expr_vector > 0]
  if (length(expr_vector) < 2) return(0)
  
  p <- expr_vector / sum(expr_vector)
  entropy <- -sum(p * log2(p))
  
  return(entropy)
}

# 计算每个细胞的熵
cat("Calculating single-cell entropy...\n")
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_epi, slot = "data"))

cell_entropies <- apply(expr_matrix, 2, calculate_cell_entropy)

# 添加到Seurat对象
seurat_epi$entropy <- cell_entropies

# 统计
entropy_stats <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_entropy = mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_entropy = sd(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_entropy = median(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

write.csv(entropy_stats, 
          file.path(entropy_dir, "entropy_statistics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 可视化熵分布
p10 <- ggplot(seurat_epi@meta.data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = entropy, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Single-cell Expression Entropy",
       x = "Cell Type", y = "Shannon Entropy") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(entropy_dir, "01_cell_entropy_distribution.pdf"), 
       p10, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(entropy_dir, "01_cell_entropy_distribution.png"), 
       p10, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 熵与细胞周期的关系
p11 <- ggplot(seurat_epi@meta.data, aes(x = Phase, y = entropy, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  facet_wrap(~refined_celltype) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Entropy vs Cell Cycle Phase",
       x = "Cell Cycle Phase", y = "Shannon Entropy") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(entropy_dir, "02_entropy_vs_cell_cycle.pdf"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(entropy_dir, "02_entropy_vs_cell_cycle.png"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：伪时间分布密度分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 6: Pseudotime Density Analysis =====\n")

# 过滤轨迹数据
trajectory_epi <- trajectory_data %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"))

# 密度脊线图
p12 <- ggplot(trajectory_epi, 
              aes(x = pseudotime, y = interaction(refined_celltype, group), 
                  fill = group)) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Pseudotime Distribution Density",
       x = "Pseudotime", y = "Cell Type - Group") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(pseudotime_dir, "01_pseudotime_density_ridges.pdf"), 
       p12, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(pseudotime_dir, "01_pseudotime_density_ridges.png"), 
       p12, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 累积分布函数 (CDF)
p13 <- ggplot(trajectory_epi, aes(x = pseudotime, color = group)) +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step", size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~refined_celltype) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Pseudotime Cumulative Distribution",
       x = "Pseudotime", y = "Cumulative Probability") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(pseudotime_dir, "02_pseudotime_cdf.pdf"), 
       p13, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(pseudotime_dir, "02_pseudotime_cdf.png"), 
       p13, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 统计检验伪时间分布差异
pseudotime_tests <- trajectory_epi %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype) %>%
  summarise(
    ks_test_p = ks.test(pseudotime[group == "BHI"], 
                        pseudotime[group == "PEA"])$p.value,
    wilcox_p = wilcox.test(pseudotime[group == "BHI"], 
                          pseudotime[group == "PEA"])$p.value,
    mean_pseudotime_BHI = mean(pseudotime[group == "BHI"], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pseudotime_PEA = mean(pseudotime[group == "PEA"], na.rm = TRUE),
    median_pseudotime_BHI = median(pseudotime[group == "BHI"], na.rm = TRUE),
    median_pseudotime_PEA = median(pseudotime[group == "PEA"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

write.csv(pseudotime_tests, 
          file.path(pseudotime_dir, "pseudotime_distribution_tests.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤7：转录因子活性推断 (简化版使用AUCell)
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 7: Transcription Factor Activity Inference =====\n")

# 定义关键转录因子及其靶基因集
tf_gene_sets <- list(
  # 上皮分化相关TF
  CDX2 = c("Cdx2", "Krt20", "Muc2", "Guca2a", "Guca2b", "Car1"),
  HNF4A = c("Hnf4a", "Apoa1", "Apoa4", "Fabp1", "Fabp2", "Alb"),
  GATA4 = c("Gata4", "Gata6", "Sox9", "Lgr5", "Cdh1"),
  
  # 应激反应TF
  NFE2L2 = c("Nfe2l2", "Hmox1", "Nqo1", "Gclc", "Gclm", "Gsta1"),
  ATF4 = c("Atf4", "Ddit3", "Atf3", "Trib3", "Ppp1r15a"),
  XBP1 = c("Xbp1", "Hspa5", "Hsp90b1", "Dnajb9", "Edem1"),
  
  # 炎症相关TF
  NFKB = c("Nfkb1", "Nfkb2", "Rela", "Relb", "Tnf", "Il6", "Il1b"),
  STAT3 = c("Stat3", "Socs3", "Myc", "Ccnd1", "Bcl2l1"),
  
  # 增殖相关TF
  MYC = c("Myc", "Ccnd1", "Cdk4", "E2f1", "Pcna", "Mki67"),
  
  # Tuft分化相关TF
  POU2F3 = c("Pou2f3", "Dclk1", "Trpm5", "Il25", "Gfi1b", "Chat")
)

# 使用AUCell计算TF活性
cat("Calculating TF activity scores using AUCell...\n")

# 准备表达矩阵
expr_matrix_epi <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_epi, slot = "data"))

# 过滤基因集，只保留存在的基因
tf_gene_sets_filtered <- lapply(tf_gene_sets, function(genes) {
  intersect(genes, rownames(expr_matrix_epi))
})

# 移除空基因集
tf_gene_sets_filtered <- tf_gene_sets_filtered[sapply(tf_gene_sets_filtered, length) > 0]

# 构建基因集排名
tryCatch({
  cells_rankings <- AUCell_buildRankings(expr_matrix_epi, 
                                        nCores = 1, 
                                        plotStats = FALSE,
                                        verbose = FALSE)
  
  # 计算AUC
  cells_AUC <- AUCell_calcAUC(tf_gene_sets_filtered, 
                             cells_rankings,
                             nCores = 1,
                             verbose = FALSE)
  
  # 提取AUC矩阵
  auc_matrix <- getAUC(cells_AUC)
  
  # 添加到Seurat对象
  for (tf_name in rownames(auc_matrix)) {
    seurat_epi@meta.data[[paste0("TF_", tf_name)]] <- auc_matrix[tf_name, ]
  }
  
  # 统计TF活性
  tf_activity_stats <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
    select(refined_celltype, group, starts_with("TF_")) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("TF_"), 
                 names_to = "TF", 
                 values_to = "Activity") %>%
    group_by(refined_celltype, group, TF) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_activity = mean(Activity, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_activity = sd(Activity, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_activity = median(Activity, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  write.csv(tf_activity_stats, 
            file.path(tf_activity_dir, "tf_activity_statistics.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 可视化TF活性热图
  tf_heatmap_data <- tf_activity_stats %>%
    select(refined_celltype, group, TF, mean_activity) %>%
    unite("condition", refined_celltype, group, sep = "_") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = TF, values_from = mean_activity) %>%
    column_to_rownames("condition")
  
  # 移除TF_前缀
  colnames(tf_heatmap_data) <- gsub("TF_", "", colnames(tf_heatmap_data))
  
  pdf(file.path(tf_activity_dir, "01_tf_activity_heatmap.pdf"), 
      width = 10, height = 6)
  pheatmap(t(tf_heatmap_data),
           scale = "row",
           color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
           cluster_rows = TRUE,
           cluster_cols = FALSE,
           main = "Transcription Factor Activity",
           fontsize = 10,
           angle_col = "45")
  dev.off()
  
  png(file.path(tf_activity_dir, "01_tf_activity_heatmap.png"), 
      width = 10*100, height = 6*100, res = 100)
  pheatmap(t(tf_heatmap_data),
           scale = "row",
           color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
           cluster_rows = TRUE,
           cluster_cols = FALSE,
           main = "Transcription Factor Activity",
           fontsize = 10,
           angle_col = "45")
  dev.off()
  
  # TF活性对比（选择关键TF）
  key_tfs <- c("TF_CDX2", "TF_NFE2L2", "TF_ATF4", "TF_NFKB", "TF_POU2F3")
  available_tfs <- intersect(key_tfs, colnames(seurat_epi@meta.data))
  
  if (length(available_tfs) > 0) {
    tf_comparison_data <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
      select(refined_celltype, group, all_of(available_tfs)) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = all_of(available_tfs), 
                   names_to = "TF", 
                   values_to = "Activity") %>%
      mutate(TF = gsub("TF_", "", TF))
    
    p14 <- ggplot(tf_comparison_data, 
                  aes(x = refined_celltype, y = Activity, fill = group)) +
      geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
      facet_wrap(~TF, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
      labs(title = "Key Transcription Factor Activity",
           x = "Cell Type", y = "Activity Score") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
    
    ggsave(file.path(tf_activity_dir, "02_key_tf_activity_comparison.pdf"), 
           p14, width = 12, height = 10)
    ggsave(file.path(tf_activity_dir, "02_key_tf_activity_comparison.png"), 
           p14, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  }
  
  # TF活性差异统计检验
  tf_diff_tests <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
    select(refined_celltype, group, starts_with("TF_")) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("TF_"), 
                 names_to = "TF", 
                 values_to = "Activity") %>%
    group_by(refined_celltype, TF) %>%
    summarise(
      wilcox_p = wilcox.test(Activity[group == "BHI"], 
                            Activity[group == "PEA"])$p.value,
      mean_BHI = mean(Activity[group == "BHI"], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_PEA = mean(Activity[group == "PEA"], na.rm = TRUE),
      fold_change = mean_PEA / (mean_BHI + 1e-10),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    mutate(TF = gsub("TF_", "", TF),
           significant = wilcox_p < 0.05)
  
  write.csv(tf_diff_tests, 
            file.path(tf_activity_dir, "tf_activity_differential_tests.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("TF activity analysis completed successfully\n")
  
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("Error in TF activity analysis: %s\n", e$message))
})

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤8：代谢异质性分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 8: Metabolic Heterogeneity Analysis =====\n")

# 定义代谢通路基因集
metabolic_pathways <- list(
  Glycolysis = c("Hk1", "Hk2", "Pfkl", "Pfkm", "Aldoa", "Gapdh", "Pgk1", "Eno1", "Pkm", "Ldha"),
  Oxidative_Phosphorylation = c("Ndufs1", "Ndufs2", "Ndufs3", "Sdhb", "Uqcrc1", "Cox4i1", 
                                "Cox5a", "Atp5a1", "Atp5b"),
  Fatty_Acid_Oxidation = c("Cpt1a", "Cpt2", "Acadm", "Acadl", "Hadh", "Echs1"),
  Glutamine_Metabolism = c("Gls", "Gls2", "Glud1", "Got1", "Got2", "Glul"),
  Pentose_Phosphate = c("G6pd", "Pgd", "Rpe", "Rpia", "Tkt", "Taldo1"),
  TCA_Cycle = c("Cs", "Aco2", "Idh1", "Idh2", "Ogdh", "Sucla2", "Sdha", "Fh1", "Mdh2")
)

# 计算代谢通路评分
cat("Calculating metabolic pathway scores...\n")

for (pathway_name in names(metabolic_pathways)) {
  pathway_genes <- intersect(metabolic_pathways[[pathway_name]], 
                            rownames(seurat_epi))
  
  if (length(pathway_genes) >= 3) {
    seurat_epi <- AddModuleScore(seurat_epi,
                                 features = list(pathway_genes),
                                 name = paste0("Metabolic_", pathway_name),
                                 seed = 123)
    
    # 重命名列（移除自动添加的数字）
    old_col <- paste0("Metabolic_", pathway_name, "1")
    new_col <- paste0("Metabolic_", pathway_name)
    if (old_col %in% colnames(seurat_epi@meta.data)) {
      colnames(seurat_epi@meta.data)[colnames(seurat_epi@meta.data) == old_col] <- new_col
    }
  }
}

# 统计代谢评分
metabolic_cols <- grep("^Metabolic_", colnames(seurat_epi@meta.data), value = TRUE)

if (length(metabolic_cols) > 0) {
  metabolic_stats <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
    select(refined_celltype, group, all_of(metabolic_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(metabolic_cols), 
                 names_to = "Pathway", 
                 values_to = "Score") %>%
    group_by(refined_celltype, group, Pathway) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_score = mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_score = sd(Score, na.rm = TRUE),
      cv_score = sd_score / abs(mean_score + 1e-10),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    mutate(Pathway = gsub("Metabolic_", "", Pathway))
  
  write.csv(metabolic_stats, 
            file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "metabolic_pathway_statistics.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 可视化代谢评分
  p15 <- ggplot(metabolic_stats, 
                aes(x = refined_celltype, y = mean_score, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    facet_wrap(~Pathway, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Metabolic Pathway Activity",
         x = "Cell Type", y = "Mean Pathway Score") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "metabolic_pathway_activity.pdf"), 
         p15, width = 12, height = 10)
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "metabolic_pathway_activity.png"), 
         p15, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
  
  # 代谢异质性（CV）
  p16 <- ggplot(metabolic_stats, 
                aes(x = refined_celltype, y = cv_score, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    facet_wrap(~Pathway, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Metabolic Pathway Heterogeneity (CV)",
         x = "Cell Type", y = "Coefficient of Variation") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "metabolic_heterogeneity_cv.pdf"), 
         p16, width = 12, height = 10)
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "metabolic_heterogeneity_cv.png"), 
         p16, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤9：综合异质性指数
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 9: Comprehensive Heterogeneity Index =====\n")

# 整合所有异质性指标
comprehensive_heterogeneity <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
  select(refined_celltype, group, entropy) %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells = n(),
    entropy_mean = mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    entropy_cv = sd(entropy, na.rm = TRUE) / (mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE) + 1e-10),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# 添加ML异质性指标
if (!is.null(ml_scores)) {
  ml_summary <- ml_scores %>%
    group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
    summarise(
      euclidean_mean = mean(euclidean_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
      euclidean_cv = sd(euclidean_distance, na.rm = TRUE) / 
                     (mean(euclidean_distance, na.rm = TRUE) + 1e-10),
      knn_mean = mean(knn_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
      knn_cv = sd(knn_distance, na.rm = TRUE) / 
               (mean(knn_distance, na.rm = TRUE) + 1e-10),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  comprehensive_heterogeneity <- comprehensive_heterogeneity %>%
    left_join(ml_summary, by = c("refined_celltype", "group"))
}

# 添加细胞周期多样性
cell_cycle_diversity <- seurat_epi@meta.data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    phase_entropy = {
      phase_counts <- table(Phase)
      phase_probs <- phase_counts / sum(phase_counts)
      -sum(phase_probs * log2(phase_probs + 1e-10))
    },
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

comprehensive_heterogeneity <- comprehensive_heterogeneity %>%
  left_join(cell_cycle_diversity, by = c("refined_celltype", "group"))

# 计算综合异质性指数（标准化后平均）
heterogeneity_metrics_to_normalize <- c("entropy_cv", "euclidean_cv", "knn_cv", "phase_entropy")
available_metrics <- intersect(heterogeneity_metrics_to_normalize, 
                              colnames(comprehensive_heterogeneity))

if (length(available_metrics) > 0) {
  # 标准化
  for (metric in available_metrics) {
    values <- comprehensive_heterogeneity[[metric]]
    normalized <- (values - min(values, na.rm = TRUE)) / 
                 (max(values, na.rm = TRUE) - min(values, na.rm = TRUE) + 1e-10)
    comprehensive_heterogeneity[[paste0(metric, "_norm")]] <- normalized
  }
  
  # 计算综合指数
  norm_cols <- paste0(available_metrics, "_norm")
  comprehensive_heterogeneity$heterogeneity_index <- rowMeans(
    comprehensive_heterogeneity[, norm_cols], na.rm = TRUE
  )
}

# 保存结果
write.csv(comprehensive_heterogeneity, 
          file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "comprehensive_heterogeneity_index.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 可视化综合异质性指数
if ("heterogeneity_index" %in% colnames(comprehensive_heterogeneity)) {
  p17 <- ggplot(comprehensive_heterogeneity, 
                aes(x = refined_celltype, y = heterogeneity_index, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", heterogeneity_index)), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Comprehensive Heterogeneity Index",
         x = "Cell Type", y = "Heterogeneity Index (0-1)",
         caption = "Index based on entropy CV, euclidean CV, KNN CV, and phase entropy") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "comprehensive_heterogeneity_index.pdf"), 
         p17, width = 10, height = 6)
  ggsave(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "comprehensive_heterogeneity_index.png"), 
         p17, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# 清理内存
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤10：生成综合报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n===== Step 10: Generating Comprehensive Report =====\n")

# 创建最终摘要
final_summary <- list(
  "Sample_Statistics" = list(
    Total_Epi7_BHI = sum(seurat_epi@meta.data$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                        seurat_epi@meta.data$group == "BHI"),
    Total_Epi7_PEA = sum(seurat_epi@meta.data$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                        seurat_epi@meta.data$group == "PEA"),
    Total_Epi13_BHI = sum(seurat_epi@meta.data$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                         seurat_epi@meta.data$group == "BHI"),
    Total_Epi13_PEA = sum(seurat_epi@meta.data$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                         seurat_epi@meta.data$group == "PEA")
  ),
  
  "Subcluster_Statistics" = list(
    Epi7_Subclusters = length(unique(seurat_epi7$subcluster)),
    Epi13_Subclusters = length(unique(seurat_epi13$subcluster))
  ),
  
  "Heterogeneity_Metrics" = list(
    Metrics_Calculated = c("Expression_CV", "Shannon_Entropy", "Euclidean_Distance", 
                          "KNN_Distance", "Cell_Cycle_Diversity"),
    Consensus_Genes_Used = length(consensus_genes)
  ),
  
  "TF_Activity" = list(
    TFs_Analyzed = names(tf_gene_sets_filtered),
    Key_TFs = c("CDX2", "HNF4A", "NFE2L2", "ATF4", "NFKB", "POU2F3")
  ),
  
  "Output_Files" = list(
    Subclustering = list.files(subcluster_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$"),
    Heterogeneity_Scores = list.files(heterogeneity_score_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$"),
    TF_Activity = list.files(tf_activity_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$"),
    Cell_Cycle = list.files(cell_cycle_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$"),
    Entropy = list.files(entropy_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$"),
    Pseudotime = list.files(pseudotime_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$")
  )
)

# 保存报告
sink(file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "analysis_summary_report.txt"))
cat("=============================================================================\n")
cat("Epi7 vs Epi13 Heterogeneity Analysis - Comprehensive Report\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")
cat("Analysis Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n\n")

for (section_name in names(final_summary)) {
  cat(sprintf("=== %s ===\n", section_name))
  section_data <- final_summary[[section_name]]
  
  if (is.list(section_data)) {
    for (item_name in names(section_data)) {
      item_value <- section_data[[item_name]]
      if (length(item_value) > 1) {
        cat(sprintf("%s:\n", item_name))
        for (v in item_value) {
          cat(sprintf("  - %s\n", v))
        }
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("%s: %s\n", item_name, item_value))
      }
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
}

cat("=============================================================================\n")
cat("Key Findings:\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")

# 异质性变化总结
if (exists("comprehensive_heterogeneity")) {
  cat("1. Heterogeneity Index Changes:\n")
  for (ct in unique(comprehensive_heterogeneity$refined_celltype)) {
    bhi_idx <- comprehensive_heterogeneity$heterogeneity_index[
      comprehensive_heterogeneity$refined_celltype == ct & 
      comprehensive_heterogeneity$group == "BHI"]
    pea_idx <- comprehensive_heterogeneity$heterogeneity_index[
      comprehensive_heterogeneity$refined_celltype == ct & 
      comprehensive_heterogeneity$group == "PEA"]
    
    if (length(bhi_idx) > 0 && length(pea_idx) > 0) {
      change <- ((pea_idx - bhi_idx) / bhi_idx) * 100
      cat(sprintf("   %s: %.1f%% %s in PEA\n", 
                 ct, abs(change), ifelse(change > 0, "increase", "decrease")))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
}

# 亚群变化
cat("2. Subcluster Emergence:\n")
cat(sprintf("   Epithelial_7: %d subclusters identified\n", 
           length(unique(seurat_epi7$subcluster))))
cat(sprintf("   Epithelial_13: %d subclusters identified\n", 
           length(unique(seurat_epi13$subcluster))))
cat("\n")

# TF活性变化
if (exists("tf_diff_tests")) {
  sig_tf <- tf_diff_tests %>%
    filter(significant == TRUE) %>%
    arrange(wilcox_p)
  
  if (nrow(sig_tf) > 0) {
    cat("3. Significant TF Activity Changes (p < 0.05):\n")
    for (i in 1:min(5, nrow(sig_tf))) {
      cat(sprintf("   %s in %s: %.2f-fold change (p=%.4f)\n",
                 sig_tf$TF[i], sig_tf$refined_celltype[i],
                 sig_tf$fold_change[i], sig_tf$wilcox_p[i]))
    }
  }
}

cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("Analysis Complete!\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n")
sink()

# 保存Seurat对象
saveRDS(seurat_epi, file.path(heterogeneity_dir, "seurat_epi_with_heterogeneity_scores.rds"))

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Analysis Complete! =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("Output directories:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Main directory: %s\n", heterogeneity_dir))
cat(sprintf("  - Subclustering: %s\n", subcluster_dir))
cat(sprintf("  - Heterogeneity scores: %s\n", heterogeneity_score_dir))
cat(sprintf("  - TF activity: %s\n", tf_activity_dir))
cat(sprintf("  - Cell cycle: %s\n", cell_cycle_dir))
cat(sprintf("  - Entropy analysis: %s\n", entropy_dir))
cat(sprintf("  - Pseudotime density: %s\n", pseudotime_dir))

cat("\nGenerated files:\n")
cat("  - Multiple PDF and PNG plots\n")
cat("  - CSV data tables\n")
cat("  - Comprehensive summary report\n")
cat("  - Annotated Seurat object with heterogeneity scores\n")

# 最终内存清理
gc()

cat("\nAll analyses completed successfully!\n")
```
```{r}
# 准备工作：记录开始时间
start_time <- Sys.time()

# 定义保存函数（如果还没定义）
safe_save_plot <- function(plot_obj, filepath_base, width = 10, height = 8) {
  tryCatch({
    ggsave(paste0(filepath_base, ".pdf"), plot_obj, 
           width = width, height = height, device = "pdf")
    ggsave(paste0(filepath_base, ".png"), plot_obj, 
           width = width, height = height, dpi = 300)
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ Saved: %s\n", basename(filepath_base)))
    return(TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  ✗ Error saving plot: %s\n", e$message))
    return(FALSE)
  })
}

safe_save_data <- function(data, filepath, row_names = FALSE) {
  tryCatch({
    write.csv(data, filepath, row.names = row_names)
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ Saved: %s\n", basename(filepath)))
    return(TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  ✗ Error saving data: %s\n", e$message))
    return(FALSE)
  })
}

```


```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 清理内存
# =============================================================================
gc()
select <- dplyr::select
filter <- dplyr::filter
rename <- dplyr::rename
# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：Tuft细胞基础特征分析（完整版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 1: Basic Characterization of Tuft Cells =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 1.1 经典Tuft标志基因表达
cat("Analyzing classical Tuft marker genes...\n")

tuft_markers <- c(
  # 核心标记
  "Dclk1", "Trpm5", "Gnat3", "Gng13", "Plcb2",
  # 化学感受
  "Tas1r3", "Tas2r108", "Tas2r138", "P2ry2",
  # 免疫调节
  "Il25", "Il13", "Il4ra", "Tslp",
  # 脂质代谢
  "Alox5", "Alox5ap", "Ptgs1", "Ptgs2",
  # 转录因子
  "Pou2f3", "Sox4", "Gfi1b", "Chat"
)

# 检查基因可用性
available_markers <- intersect(tuft_markers, rownames(seurat_tuft))
missing_markers <- setdiff(tuft_markers, rownames(seurat_tuft))

cat(sprintf("Available markers: %d/%d\n", length(available_markers), length(tuft_markers)))
if (length(missing_markers) > 0) {
  cat("Missing markers:", paste(head(missing_markers, 5), collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

if (length(available_markers) == 0) {
  cat("Warning: No Tuft marker genes found in the dataset!\n")
} else {
  # 提取标记基因表达
  marker_expr <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(
    GetAssayData(seurat_tuft, slot = "data")[available_markers, ]
  )))
  marker_expr$group <- seurat_tuft$group
  marker_expr$cell_id <- rownames(marker_expr)
  
  # 计算平均表达
  marker_summary <- marker_expr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(available_markers), 
                 names_to = "Gene", 
                 values_to = "Expression") %>%
    group_by(Gene, group) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_expr = mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_expr = median(Expression, na.rm = TRUE),
      percent_expressed = sum(Expression > 0) / n() * 100,
      sd_expr = sd(Expression, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  safe_save_data(marker_summary, 
                 file.path(tuft_basic_dir, "tuft_marker_expression_summary.csv"))
  
  # 热图可视化标记基因表达
  marker_heatmap_data <- marker_summary %>%
    select(Gene, group, mean_expr) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean_expr) %>%
    column_to_rownames("Gene")
  
  pdf(file.path(tuft_basic_dir, "01_tuft_markers_heatmap.pdf"), width = 6, height = 10)
  pheatmap(marker_heatmap_data,
           scale = "row",
           color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
           cluster_cols = FALSE,
           main = "Tuft Cell Marker Expression",
           fontsize = 10,
           angle_col = "0")
  dev.off()
  
  png(file.path(tuft_basic_dir, "01_tuft_markers_heatmap.png"), 
      width = 6*100, height = 10*100, res = 100)
  pheatmap(marker_heatmap_data,
           scale = "row",
           color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
           cluster_cols = FALSE,
           main = "Tuft Cell Marker Expression",
           fontsize = 10,
           angle_col = "0")
  dev.off()
  
  cat("  ✓ Saved marker expression heatmap\n")
  
  # 小提琴图展示关键标记
  key_markers <- c("Dclk1", "Trpm5", "Il25", "Pou2f3", "Alox5")
  available_key_markers <- intersect(key_markers, available_markers)
  
  if (length(available_key_markers) > 0) {
    marker_plot_data <- marker_expr %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = all_of(available_key_markers), 
                   names_to = "Gene", 
                   values_to = "Expression")
    
    p1 <- ggplot(marker_plot_data, aes(x = group, y = Expression, fill = group)) +
      geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_boxplot(width = 0.1) +
      facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
      stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.format") +
      labs(title = "Key Tuft Marker Expression",
           x = "Group", y = "Expression Level") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(legend.position = "top",
            strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
    
    safe_save_plot(p1, file.path(tuft_basic_dir, "02_key_markers_violin"), 12, 8)
  }
}

# 1.2 Tuft细胞质量控制指标
cat("\nAnalyzing quality control metrics...\n")

qc_stats <- seurat_tuft@meta.data %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells = n(),
    mean_nCount_RNA = mean(nCount_RNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_nCount_RNA = sd(nCount_RNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_nFeature_RNA = mean(nFeature_RNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_nFeature_RNA = sd(nFeature_RNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

safe_save_data(qc_stats, file.path(tuft_basic_dir, "tuft_qc_statistics.csv"))

cat("QC Statistics Summary:\n")
print(qc_stats)

# QC指标可视化
qc_data <- seurat_tuft@meta.data %>%
  select(group, nCount_RNA, nFeature_RNA) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(nCount_RNA, nFeature_RNA), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Value")

p2 <- ggplot(qc_data, aes(x = group, y = Value, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.format") +
  labs(title = "Tuft Cell Quality Control Metrics",
       x = "Group", y = "Value") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

safe_save_plot(p2, file.path(tuft_basic_dir, "03_qc_metrics"), 10, 5)

cat("✓ Step 1 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：Tuft细胞亚群分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 2: Tuft Cell Subpopulation Analysis =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("Performing fine-grained clustering of Tuft cells...\n")

# 检查细胞数量是否足够进行聚类
if (ncol(seurat_tuft) < 20) {
  cat("Warning: Too few Tuft cells (", ncol(seurat_tuft), ") for meaningful clustering\n")
  cat("Skipping subcluster analysis\n")
  seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster <- "Tuft_all"
} else {
  # 标准化和降维
  seurat_tuft <- NormalizeData(seurat_tuft, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_tuft <- FindVariableFeatures(seurat_tuft, nfeatures = 2000, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_tuft <- ScaleData(seurat_tuft, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_tuft <- RunPCA(seurat_tuft, npcs = 30, verbose = FALSE)
  
  # 确定最佳PC数量
  pct_variance <- seurat_tuft@reductions$pca@stdev^2 / sum(seurat_tuft@reductions$pca@stdev^2)
  cumsum_pct <- cumsum(pct_variance)
  optimal_pcs <- which(cumsum_pct > 0.9)[1]
  optimal_pcs <- min(optimal_pcs, 20, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat(sprintf("Using %d PCs for clustering\n", optimal_pcs))
  
  # 尝试聚类
  seurat_tuft <- FindNeighbors(seurat_tuft, dims = 1:optimal_pcs, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_tuft <- FindClusters(seurat_tuft, resolution = 0.3, verbose = FALSE)
  seurat_tuft <- RunUMAP(seurat_tuft, dims = 1:optimal_pcs, verbose = FALSE)
  
  seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster <- paste0("Tuft_sub", seurat_tuft$seurat_clusters)
  
  cat(sprintf("Identified %d subclusters\n", length(unique(seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster))))
  
  # 可视化亚群
  p3 <- DimPlot(seurat_tuft, group.by = "tuft_subcluster", split.by = "group", 
                label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    labs(title = "Tuft Cell Subclusters") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  safe_save_plot(p3, file.path(tuft_subcluster_dir, "01_tuft_subclusters_umap"), 12, 6)
  
  # 亚群分布统计
  subcluster_stats <- seurat_tuft@meta.data %>%
    group_by(group, tuft_subcluster) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100)
  
  safe_save_data(subcluster_stats, 
                 file.path(tuft_subcluster_dir, "tuft_subcluster_distribution.csv"))
  
  p4 <- ggplot(subcluster_stats, aes(x = tuft_subcluster, y = percentage, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Tuft Cell Subcluster Distribution",
         x = "Subcluster", y = "Percentage (%)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "top")
  
  safe_save_plot(p4, file.path(tuft_subcluster_dir, "02_subcluster_distribution"), 10, 6)
  
  # 寻找亚群标志基因（如果有多个亚群）
  if (length(unique(seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster)) > 1) {
    cat("Finding subcluster marker genes...\n")
    Idents(seurat_tuft) <- "tuft_subcluster"
    
    tryCatch({
      subcluster_markers <- FindAllMarkers(seurat_tuft, 
                                           only.pos = TRUE, 
                                           min.pct = 0.25,
                                           logfc.threshold = 0.25,
                                           verbose = FALSE)
      
      if (nrow(subcluster_markers) > 0) {
        safe_save_data(subcluster_markers, 
                       file.path(tuft_subcluster_dir, "tuft_subcluster_markers.csv"))
        
        top_markers <- subcluster_markers %>%
          group_by(cluster) %>%
          slice_max(order_by = avg_log2FC, n = 10)
        
        safe_save_data(top_markers, 
                       file.path(tuft_subcluster_dir, "tuft_subcluster_top_markers.csv"))
        
        cat(sprintf("  ✓ Found %d marker genes\n", nrow(subcluster_markers)))
      }
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("  ✗ Error finding markers: %s\n", e$message))
    })
  }
}

cat("✓ Step 2 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：Tuft细胞功能模块分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 3: Functional Module Analysis =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 定义功能模块
tuft_functional_modules <- list(
  Chemosensing = c("Tas1r3", "Tas2r108", "Tas2r138", "Tas2r143", "Trpm5", 
                  "Gnat3", "Gng13", "Plcb2", "P2ry2", "P2rx7"),
  Immune_Regulation = c("Il25", "Il13", "Il4", "Il4ra", "Il13ra1", "Tslp", 
                       "Csf2", "Ccl20", "Cxcl1", "Cxcl2"),
  Lipid_Mediators = c("Alox5", "Alox5ap", "Alox15", "Ptgs1", "Ptgs2", 
                     "Ptges", "Hpgds", "Ltc4s", "Cysltr1"),
  Neuropeptide_Signaling = c("Chat", "Ache", "Slc18a3", "Chrna7", "Adcyap1", 
                             "Vip", "Sst", "Tac1"),
  Metabolic_Reprogramming = c("Hk2", "Pfkl", "Ldha", "Pkm", "G6pd", "Tkt", 
                              "Fasn", "Acaca", "Scd1"),
  Epithelial_Homeostasis = c("Cdh1", "Krt8", "Krt18", "Krt19", "Epcam", 
                            "Cldn4", "Ocln", "Tjp1"),
  Oxidative_Stress_Response = c("Sod1", "Sod2", "Cat", "Gpx1", "Gpx4", 
                                "Nfe2l2", "Hmox1", "Nqo1"),
  Proliferation_Survival = c("Mki67", "Pcna", "Ccnd1", "Myc", "Bcl2", 
                            "Bcl2l1", "Mcl1", "Birc5")
)

# 计算模块评分
cat("Calculating functional module scores...\n")
module_cols <- c()

for (module_name in names(tuft_functional_modules)) {
  module_genes <- intersect(tuft_functional_modules[[module_name]], 
                           rownames(seurat_tuft))
  
  if (length(module_genes) >= 3) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: %d/%d genes\n", 
               module_name, length(module_genes), 
               length(tuft_functional_modules[[module_name]])))
    
    seurat_tuft <- AddModuleScore(seurat_tuft,
                                  features = list(module_genes),
                                  name = paste0("Tuft_", module_name),
                                  seed = 123)
    
    old_col <- paste0("Tuft_", module_name, "1")
    new_col <- paste0("Tuft_", module_name)
    if (old_col %in% colnames(seurat_tuft@meta.data)) {
      colnames(seurat_tuft@meta.data)[colnames(seurat_tuft@meta.data) == old_col] <- new_col
      module_cols <- c(module_cols, new_col)
    }
  }
}

cat(sprintf("✓ Calculated %d module scores\n", length(module_cols)))

if (length(module_cols) > 0) {
  # 统计
  module_stats <- seurat_tuft@meta.data %>%
    select(group, all_of(module_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(module_cols), 
                 names_to = "Module", 
                 values_to = "Score") %>%
    group_by(group, Module) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_score = mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_score = median(Score, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_score = sd(Score, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    mutate(Module = gsub("Tuft_", "", Module))
  
  safe_save_data(module_stats, 
                 file.path(tuft_function_dir, "functional_module_statistics.csv"))
  
  # 可视化
  p5 <- ggplot(module_stats, aes(x = Module, y = mean_score, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_score - sd_score, ymax = mean_score + sd_score),
                  position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.25) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Tuft Cell Functional Module Activity",
         x = "Functional Module", y = "Mean Module Score") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "top")
  
  safe_save_plot(p5, file.path(tuft_function_dir, "01_functional_modules_barplot"), 12, 6)
  
  # 热图
  module_heatmap_data <- module_stats %>%
    select(group, Module, mean_score) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean_score) %>%
    column_to_rownames("Module")
  
  pdf(file.path(tuft_function_dir, "02_functional_modules_heatmap.pdf"), width = 8, height = 6)
  pheatmap(module_heatmap_data,
           scale = "row",
           color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
           cluster_cols = FALSE,
           main = "Tuft Functional Module Activity",
           fontsize = 10,
           angle_col = "0")
  dev.off()
  
  png(file.path(tuft_function_dir, "02_functional_modules_heatmap.png"), 
      width = 8*100, height = 6*100, res = 100)
  pheatmap(module_heatmap_data,
           scale = "row",
           color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
           cluster_cols = FALSE,
           main = "Tuft Functional Module Activity",
           fontsize = 10,
           angle_col = "0")
  dev.off()
  
  cat("  ✓ Saved module heatmap\n")
  
  # 统计检验
  cat("\nPerforming statistical tests...\n")
  module_tests <- data.frame()
  
  for (module in module_cols) {
    bhi_scores <- seurat_tuft@meta.data[seurat_tuft@meta.data$group == "BHI", module]
    pea_scores <- seurat_tuft@meta.data[seurat_tuft@meta.data$group == "PEA", module]
    
    bhi_scores <- bhi_scores[!is.na(bhi_scores)]
    pea_scores <- pea_scores[!is.na(pea_scores)]
    
    if (length(bhi_scores) >= 3 && length(pea_scores) >= 3) {
      test_result <- wilcox.test(pea_scores, bhi_scores)
      mean_bhi <- mean(bhi_scores)
      mean_pea <- mean(pea_scores)
      
      module_tests <- rbind(module_tests, data.frame(
        Module = gsub("Tuft_", "", module),
        mean_BHI = mean_bhi,
        mean_PEA = mean_pea,
        fold_change = mean_pea / (mean_bhi + 1e-10),
        wilcox_p = test_result$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(module_tests) > 0) {
    module_tests$p_adj <- p.adjust(module_tests$wilcox_p, method = "BH")
    module_tests$significant <- module_tests$p_adj < 0.05
    module_tests$direction <- ifelse(module_tests$fold_change > 1, "Upregulated", "Downregulated")
    
    safe_save_data(module_tests, 
                   file.path(tuft_function_dir, "functional_module_tests.csv"))
    
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ %d/%d modules significantly different\n", 
               sum(module_tests$significant), nrow(module_tests)))
  }
  
  # 相关性分析
  if (length(module_cols) > 1) {
    module_cor_data <- seurat_tuft@meta.data[, module_cols]
    colnames(module_cor_data) <- gsub("Tuft_", "", colnames(module_cor_data))
    cor_matrix <- cor(module_cor_data, use = "complete.obs")
    
    pdf(file.path(tuft_function_dir, "03_module_correlation.pdf"), width = 10, height = 10)
    corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper", tl.col = "black",
             tl.srt = 45, addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.7,
             title = "Module Correlations", mar = c(0,0,2,0))
    dev.off()
    
    png(file.path(tuft_function_dir, "03_module_correlation.png"), 
        width = 10*100, height = 10*100, res = 100)
    corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper", tl.col = "black",
             tl.srt = 45, addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.7,
             title = "Module Correlations", mar = c(0,0,2,0))
    dev.off()
    
    cat("  ✓ Saved correlation plot\n")
  }
}

cat("✓ Step 3 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：细胞互作分析（替代方法）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 4: Cell Interaction Analysis (Alternative Method) =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 使用配体-受体表达分析
lr_pairs <- data.frame(
  ligand = c("Il25", "Il13", "Tslp", "Csf2", "Ccl20", "Cxcl1", "Cxcl2",
             "Egf", "Tgfb1", "Bmp2", "Bmp4", "Wnt3a", "Wnt5a"),
  receptor = c("Il17rb", "Il13ra1", "Crlf2", "Csf2rb", "Ccr6", "Cxcr2", "Cxcr2",
              "Egfr", "Tgfbr1", "Bmpr1a", "Bmpr1a", "Fzd1", "Fzd5"),
  pathway = c("IL25", "IL13", "TSLP", "CSF", "Chemokine", "Chemokine", "Chemokine",
             "EGF", "TGFb", "BMP", "BMP", "WNT", "WNT"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

available_ligands <- intersect(lr_pairs$ligand, rownames(seurat_tuft))

if (length(available_ligands) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("Analyzing %d ligands in Tuft cells...\n", length(available_ligands)))
  
  ligand_expr <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(
    GetAssayData(seurat_tuft, slot = "data")[available_ligands, ]
  )))
  ligand_expr$group <- seurat_tuft$group
  
  ligand_summary <- ligand_expr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(available_ligands), 
                 names_to = "Ligand", 
                 values_to = "Expression") %>%
    group_by(group, Ligand) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_expr = mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_expressed = sum(Expression > 0) / n() * 100,
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    left_join(lr_pairs, by = c("Ligand" = "ligand"))
  
  safe_save_data(ligand_summary, 
                 file.path(tuft_interaction_dir, "tuft_ligand_expression.csv"))
  
  p6 <- ggplot(ligand_summary, aes(x = Ligand, y = mean_expr, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Ligand Expression in Tuft Cells",
         x = "Ligand", y = "Mean Expression") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "top")
  
  safe_save_plot(p6, file.path(tuft_interaction_dir, "01_tuft_ligand_expression"), 10, 6)
  
  cat("  ✓ Analyzed ligand expression\n")
}

cat("✓ Step 4 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：轨迹分析（有限数据版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 5: Trajectory Analysis =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

if (nrow(trajectory_tuft) >= 10) {
  cat("Performing trajectory analysis...\n")
  
  # 伪时间分布
  tuft_pseudotime_stats <- trajectory_tuft %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    summarise(
      n_cells = n(),
      mean_pseudotime = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_pseudotime = median(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_pseudotime = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  safe_save_data(tuft_pseudotime_stats, 
                 file.path(tuft_trajectory_dir, "tuft_pseudotime_statistics.csv"))
  
  p7 <- ggplot(trajectory_tuft, aes(x = pseudotime, fill = group)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "Tuft Cell Pseudotime Distribution",
         x = "Pseudotime", y = "Density") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  safe_save_plot(p7, file.path(tuft_trajectory_dir, "01_tuft_pseudotime_density"), 10, 6)
  
  cat("  ✓ Completed trajectory analysis\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Insufficient trajectory data (%d cells) - skipping trajectory analysis\n", 
             nrow(trajectory_tuft)))
  writeLines(
    c("Trajectory Analysis - Insufficient Data",
      "",
      sprintf("Only %d Tuft cells were found in the trajectory data.", nrow(trajectory_tuft)),
      "This is insufficient for meaningful trajectory analysis.",
      "",
      "Possible reasons:",
      "1. Tuft cells may not have been included in the trajectory analysis",
      "2. Trajectory analysis may have filtered out most Tuft cells",
      "3. The trajectory may focus on epithelial differentiation only",
      "",
      "Recommendation: Re-run trajectory analysis including Tuft cells if needed."),
    file.path(tuft_trajectory_dir, "README_insufficient_data.txt")
  )
}

cat("✓ Step 5 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：差异表达和特征基因分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 6: Differential Expression and Signature Genes =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 6.1 Tuft vs 上皮细胞
cat("Finding Tuft-specific genes vs epithelial cells...\n")

seurat_comparison <- subset(seurat_pure, 
                           refined_celltype %in% c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30"))
Idents(seurat_comparison) <- "refined_celltype"

tryCatch({
  tuft_specific_markers <- FindMarkers(seurat_comparison,
                                      ident.1 = "Tuft_30",
                                      ident.2 = c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"),
                                      only.pos = TRUE,
                                      min.pct = 0.25,
                                      logfc.threshold = 0.5,
                                      verbose = FALSE)
  
  if (nrow(tuft_specific_markers) > 0) {
    tuft_specific_markers$gene <- rownames(tuft_specific_markers)
    tuft_specific_markers <- tuft_specific_markers %>%
      arrange(desc(avg_log2FC))
    
    safe_save_data(tuft_specific_markers, 
                   file.path(tuft_signature_dir, "tuft_specific_markers.csv"))
    
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ Found %d Tuft-specific genes\n", nrow(tuft_specific_markers)))
    
    # Top genes
    top_tuft_genes <- head(tuft_specific_markers, 50)
    safe_save_data(top_tuft_genes, 
                   file.path(tuft_signature_dir, "top50_tuft_specific_genes.csv"))
    
    # 热图（如果有足够的基因）
    if (nrow(tuft_specific_markers) >= 20) {
      top20_genes <- head(tuft_specific_markers$gene, 20)
      
      pdf(file.path(tuft_signature_dir, "01_top_tuft_markers_heatmap.pdf"), 
          width = 8, height = 10)
      DoHeatmap(seurat_comparison, features = top20_genes, 
                group.by = "refined_celltype") +
        scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "white", "red"))
      dev.off()
      
      png(file.path(tuft_signature_dir, "01_top_tuft_markers_heatmap.png"), 
          width = 8*100, height = 10*100, res = 100)
      DoHeatmap(seurat_comparison, features = top20_genes, 
                group.by = "refined_celltype") +
        scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "white", "red"))
      dev.off()
      
      cat("  ✓ Saved Tuft-specific marker heatmap\n")
    }
  }
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("  ✗ Error: %s\n", e$message))
})

# 6.2 Tuft中BHI vs PEA
cat("\nFinding DEGs in Tuft cells: PEA vs BHI...\n")

Idents(seurat_tuft) <- "group"

tryCatch({
  tuft_deg <- FindMarkers(seurat_tuft,
                         ident.1 = "PEA",
                         ident.2 = "BHI",
                         min.pct = 0.1,
                         logfc.threshold = 0.25,
                         verbose = FALSE)
  
  if (nrow(tuft_deg) > 0) {
    tuft_deg$gene <- rownames(tuft_deg)
    tuft_deg <- tuft_deg %>%
      mutate(
        regulation = case_when(
          p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0.5 ~ "Upregulated",
          p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < -0.5 ~ "Downregulated",
          TRUE ~ "Not significant"
        )
      ) %>%
      arrange(p_val_adj)
    
    safe_save_data(tuft_deg, 
                   file.path(tuft_signature_dir, "tuft_deg_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"))
    
    # 统计
    deg_summary <- tuft_deg %>%
      filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5) %>%
      group_by(regulation) %>%
      summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop')
    
    cat("\nDEG Summary:\n")
    print(deg_summary)
    
    # 火山图
    p8 <- ggplot(tuft_deg, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj + 1e-300))) +
      geom_point(aes(color = regulation), alpha = 0.6) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Upregulated" = "#E59693", 
                                    "Downregulated" = "#78A9cd",
                                    "Not significant" = "grey")) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
      labs(title = "Tuft Cell DEGs: PEA vs BHI",
           x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = "-Log10(Adjusted P-value)") +
      theme_minimal()
    
    safe_save_plot(p8, file.path(tuft_signature_dir, "02_tuft_deg_volcano"), 10, 8)
    
    cat(sprintf("  ✓ Found %d DEGs\n", nrow(deg_summary)))
  }
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("  ✗ Error: %s\n", e$message))
})

cat("✓ Step 6 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤7：与上皮细胞比较
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 7: Comparison with Epithelial Cells =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 细胞数量对比
cell_count_comparison <- seurat_pure@meta.data %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")) %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100)

safe_save_data(cell_count_comparison, 
               file.path(tuft_comparison_dir, "cell_count_comparison.csv"))

p9 <- ggplot(cell_count_comparison, 
            aes(x = refined_celltype, y = percentage, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Cell Type Proportion Comparison",
       x = "Cell Type", y = "Percentage (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

safe_save_plot(p9, file.path(tuft_comparison_dir, "01_cell_proportion_comparison"), 10, 6)

# 转录组相似性
cat("Calculating transcriptome similarity...\n")

comparison_cells <- subset(seurat_pure, 
                          refined_celltype %in% c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30"))

# 使用AggregateExpression（Seurat v5推荐）
avg_expr_by_type <- AggregateExpression(
  comparison_cells, 
  group.by = c("refined_celltype", "group"),
  slot = "data",
  return.seurat = FALSE
)$RNA

# 确保是矩阵格式
if (!is.matrix(avg_expr_by_type)) {
  avg_expr_by_type <- as.matrix(avg_expr_by_type)
}

# 检查并处理NA值
avg_expr_by_type[is.na(avg_expr_by_type)] <- 0

# 计算相关性
cor_matrix_types <- cor(avg_expr_by_type)

pdf(file.path(tuft_comparison_dir, "02_transcriptome_similarity.pdf"), 
    width = 10, height = 10)
pheatmap(cor_matrix_types,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         breaks = seq(0.5, 1, length.out = 101),
         display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_format = "%.3f",
         fontsize_number = 8,
         main = "Transcriptome Similarity",
         angle_col = "45")
dev.off()

png(file.path(tuft_comparison_dir, "02_transcriptome_similarity.png"), 
    width = 10*100, height = 10*100, res = 100)
pheatmap(cor_matrix_types,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         breaks = seq(0.5, 1, length.out = 101),
         display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_format = "%.3f",
         fontsize_number = 8,
         main = "Transcriptome Similarity",
         angle_col = "45")
dev.off()

cat("  ✓ Saved similarity matrix\n")

cat("✓ Step 7 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤8：机制分析和通路富集
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 8: Mechanism and Pathway Analysis =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

if (exists("tuft_deg") && nrow(tuft_deg) > 0) {
  # 上调基因
  up_genes <- tuft_deg %>%
    filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 0.5) %>%
    pull(gene)
  
  # 下调基因
  down_genes <- tuft_deg %>%
    filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC < -0.5) %>%
    pull(gene)
  
  cat(sprintf("Upregulated genes: %d\n", length(up_genes)))
  cat(sprintf("Downregulated genes: %d\n", length(down_genes)))
  
  # GO富集 - 上调
  if (length(up_genes) >= 10) {
    cat("\nPerforming GO enrichment for upregulated genes...\n")
    tryCatch({
      go_up <- enrichGO(gene = up_genes,
                       OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
                       keyType = "SYMBOL",
                       ont = "BP",
                       pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                       pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                       qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
      
      if (!is.null(go_up) && nrow(as.data.frame(go_up)) > 0) {
        safe_save_data(as.data.frame(go_up), 
                       file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "tuft_upregulated_GO_BP.csv"))
        
        p10 <- dotplot(go_up, showCategory = 20) +
          labs(title = "GO Enrichment: Upregulated Genes (PEA)")
        
        safe_save_plot(p10, file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "01_upregulated_GO_dotplot"), 12, 10)
        
        cat("  ✓ GO enrichment completed\n")
      }
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("  ✗ GO enrichment failed: %s\n", e$message))
    })
  }
  
  # KEGG富集 - 上调
  if (length(up_genes) >= 5) {
    cat("\nPerforming KEGG enrichment for upregulated genes...\n")
    tryCatch({
      up_entrez <- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, keys = up_genes, 
                         column = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL", 
                         multiVals = "first")
      up_entrez <- up_entrez[!is.na(up_entrez)]
      
      if (length(up_entrez) >= 5) {
        kegg_up <- enrichKEGG(gene = up_entrez,
                             organism = 'mmu',
                             pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                             qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
        
        if (!is.null(kegg_up) && nrow(as.data.frame(kegg_up)) > 0) {
          safe_save_data(as.data.frame(kegg_up), 
                         file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "tuft_upregulated_KEGG.csv"))
          
          p11 <- dotplot(kegg_up, showCategory = 20) +
            labs(title = "KEGG Enrichment: Upregulated Genes (PEA)")
          
          safe_save_plot(p11, file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "02_upregulated_KEGG_dotplot"), 12, 10)
          
          cat("  ✓ KEGG enrichment completed\n")
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("  ✗ KEGG enrichment failed: %s\n", e$message))
    })
  }
}

cat("✓ Step 8 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤9：α-synuclein关联分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 9: α-Synuclein Association Analysis =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

synuclein_genes <- c(
  "Snca", "Sncb", "Sncg",
  "Ube2n", "Stub1", "Hspa8", "Lamp2a", "Ctsd", "Becn1", "Atg5", "Atg7",
  "Hspa1a", "Hspa1b", "Hsp90aa1", "Atf4", "Xbp1", "Nfe2l2",
  "Pink1", "Park2", "Mfn2", "Opa1"
)

available_syn_genes <- intersect(synuclein_genes, rownames(seurat_tuft))

if (length(available_syn_genes) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("Analyzing %d α-synuclein related genes...\n", length(available_syn_genes)))
  
  syn_expr <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(
    GetAssayData(seurat_tuft, slot = "data")[available_syn_genes, ]
  )))
  syn_expr$group <- seurat_tuft$group
  
  syn_summary <- syn_expr %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(available_syn_genes), 
                 names_to = "Gene", 
                 values_to = "Expression") %>%
    group_by(Gene, group) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_expr = mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE),
      percent_expressed = sum(Expression > 0) / n() * 100,
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  safe_save_data(syn_summary, 
                 file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "synuclein_genes_in_tuft.csv"))
  
  p12 <- ggplot(syn_summary, aes(x = Gene, y = mean_expr, fill = group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = "α-Synuclein Related Genes in Tuft Cells",
         x = "Gene", y = "Mean Expression") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "top")
  
  safe_save_plot(p12, file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "03_synuclein_genes_expression"), 12, 6)
  
  # 模块评分
  seurat_tuft <- AddModuleScore(seurat_tuft,
                                features = list(available_syn_genes),
                                name = "Synuclein_Module",
                                seed = 123)
  
  if ("Synuclein_Module1" %in% colnames(seurat_tuft@meta.data)) {
    colnames(seurat_tuft@meta.data)[
      colnames(seurat_tuft@meta.data) == "Synuclein_Module1"
    ] <- "Synuclein_Module"
  }
  
  p13 <- ggplot(seurat_tuft@meta.data, 
                aes(x = group, y = Synuclein_Module, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.format") +
    labs(title = "α-Synuclein Module Score in Tuft Cells",
         x = "Group", y = "Module Score") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  safe_save_plot(p13, file.path(tuft_mechanism_dir, "04_synuclein_module_score"), 8, 6)
  
  cat("  ✓ α-synuclein analysis completed\n")
}

cat("✓ Step 9 completed\n")
gc()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤10：生成综合报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Step 10: Generating Comprehensive Report =====\n")
```
