```{r}
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 计算关键统计
tuft_bhi <- sum(seurat_tuft$group == "BHI")
tuft_pea <- sum(seurat_tuft$group == "PEA")
fold_change <- tuft_pea / tuft_bhi

# 创建摘要报告
sink(file.path(tuft_dir, "tuft_comprehensive_analysis_report.txt"))
cat("=============================================================================\n")
cat("Tuft Cell Comprehensive Analysis Report\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")
cat("Analysis Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n\n")

cat("=== 1. Basic Statistics ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Total Tuft Cells: %d\n", ncol(seurat_tuft)))
cat(sprintf("BHI Group: %d cells (%.1f%%)\n", tuft_bhi, tuft_bhi/ncol(seurat_tuft)*100))
cat(sprintf("PEA Group: %d cells (%.1f%%)\n", tuft_pea, tuft_pea/ncol(seurat_tuft)*100))
cat(sprintf("Fold Change (PEA/BHI): %.2f\n\n", fold_change))

cat("=== 2. Marker Gene Expression ===\n")
if (length(available_markers) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("Classical markers analyzed: %d/%d\n", 
             length(available_markers), length(tuft_markers)))
  cat("Key markers:", paste(head(available_markers, 5), collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
} else {
  cat("No classical markers found\n\n")
}

cat("=== 3. Subcluster Analysis ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Number of subclusters: %d\n\n", length(unique(seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster))))

cat("=== 4. Functional Modules ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Modules analyzed: %d\n", length(module_cols)))
if (exists("module_tests") && nrow(module_tests) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("Significantly different modules: %d\n\n", sum(module_tests$significant)))
} else {
  cat("\n")
}

cat("=== 5. Differential Expression ===\n")
if (exists("tuft_deg") && nrow(tuft_deg) > 0) {
  sig_deg <- tuft_deg %>% filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5)
  cat(sprintf("Total DEGs: %d\n", nrow(sig_deg)))
  cat(sprintf("Upregulated: %d\n", sum(sig_deg$avg_log2FC > 0)))
  cat(sprintf("Downregulated: %d\n\n", sum(sig_deg$avg_log2FC < 0)))
} else {
  cat("DEG analysis not completed\n\n")
}

cat("=== 6. Key Findings ===\n\n")

if (fold_change > 1.5) {
  cat("1. EXPANSION in PEA condition:\n")
  cat("   - Tuft cells show significant expansion\n")
  cat("   - May indicate enhanced chemosensory surveillance\n")
  cat("   - Potential immune regulatory response\n\n")
} else if (fold_change < 0.67) {
  cat("1. REDUCTION in PEA condition:\n")
  cat("   - Tuft cells show reduction\n")
  cat("   - May indicate cell loss or transdifferentiation\n\n")
} else {
  cat("1. STABLE population in PEA condition:\n")
  cat("   - Tuft cells maintain homeostatic balance\n\n")
}

if (exists("module_tests") && nrow(module_tests) > 0) {
  sig_modules <- module_tests %>% filter(significant == TRUE)
  if (nrow(sig_modules) > 0) {
    cat("2. Altered functional modules:\n")
    for (i in 1:min(3, nrow(sig_modules))) {
      cat(sprintf("   - %s: %.2f-fold %s\n",
                 sig_modules$Module[i],
                 abs(sig_modules$fold_change[i]),
                 sig_modules$direction[i]))
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}

cat("=== 7. Biological Interpretation ===\n\n")
cat("The Tuft cell population shows characteristics consistent with:\n")
cat("- Chemosensory function in intestinal epithelium\n")
cat("- Immune modulation through cytokine secretion\n")
cat("- Response to PEA-induced changes\n")
cat("- Potential role in tissue homeostasis\n\n")

cat("=== 8. Data Availability ===\n\n")
print(data_summary)

cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("Analysis Complete!\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n")
sink()

# 保存Seurat对象
saveRDS(seurat_tuft, file.path(tuft_dir, "seurat_tuft_comprehensive.rds"))

# 创建结果摘要
results_summary <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Total Tuft Cells", "BHI Cells", "PEA Cells", "Fold Change",
             "Subclusters", "Functional Modules", "Available Markers"),
  Value = c(ncol(seurat_tuft), tuft_bhi, tuft_pea, 
           round(fold_change, 2),
           length(unique(seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster)),
           length(module_cols),
           length(available_markers)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

safe_save_data(results_summary, 
               file.path(tuft_dir, "tuft_analysis_summary.csv"))

cat("\n=============================================================================\n")
cat("===== All Analysis Steps Completed Successfully! =====\n")
cat("=============================================================================\n\n")

cat("Output Summary:\n")
cat(sprintf("Main directory: %s\n", tuft_dir))
cat("Generated files:\n")
cat("  - Comprehensive analysis report (TXT)\n")
cat("  - Data availability report (CSV)\n")
cat("  - Analysis summary (CSV)\n")
cat("  - Annotated Seurat object (RDS)\n")
cat("  - 8 subdirectories with detailed results\n")
cat("  - Multiple figures (PDF + PNG)\n")
cat("  - Multiple data tables (CSV)\n\n")

cat("Key Findings:\n")
cat(sprintf("  - Tuft cells: %.2f-fold change in PEA\n", fold_change))
cat(sprintf("  - %d subclusters identified\n", length(unique(seurat_tuft$tuft_subcluster))))
cat(sprintf("  - %d functional modules analyzed\n", length(module_cols)))
cat(sprintf("  - %d classical markers detected\n", length(available_markers)))

if (exists("tuft_deg")) {
  cat(sprintf("  - %d differential genes identified\n", 
             nrow(filter(tuft_deg, p_val_adj < 0.05, abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5))))
}

cat("\nAnalysis pipeline completed successfully!\n")
cat("Please review the comprehensive report for detailed biological interpretation.\n")
cat(sprintf("\nTotal runtime: %.2f minutes\n", 
           as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins"))))
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
